name: shopee-amazon-listing-mvp
description: MVP browser automation tool for preparing Shopee Seller Centre draft listings from Amazon product URLs with human review gates.

scripts.check: node --check src/main.js && node --check src/shopee/automation.js && node --check src/amazon/productSource.js && node --check src/shopeeTool/convertExport.js && node --check src/shopeeTool/source.js && node --check src/processedProducts.js
